# Code Aquarium Technologies

> Code Aquarium Technologies is a standalone digital technology company based in Lahore, Pakistan, building custom software, AI systems, and growth engines for startups and established brands worldwide. Core specialties: custom web development (Next.js/React/TypeScript), and artificial intelligence and automation (AI copilots, agents, and workflow automation). Supporting services: digital marketing and SEO, DevOps and cloud, data engineering, and UX/UI design.

## Technologies
- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Python, REST and GraphQL APIs
- Cloud: AWS, GCP, Azure, CI/CD, observability, and security hardening
- AI: LLM integration, copilots, agents, document intelligence, and automation

Positioning: a small, senior team — clients work directly with engineers and designers, no junior benches or hand-offs. Offshore economics with boutique quality. Serves clients across North America, Europe, the Middle East, and Australia, plus local Lahore/Pakistan clients.

Contact: info@codeaquarium.tech · Lahore, Pakistan · Free 30-minute strategy consultation available.

## Services
- [Web Development](https://codeaquarium.tech/services/web-development): High-performance websites, web apps, SaaS, and e-commerce on Next.js, React, and TypeScript — engineered for speed, SEO, and conversion.
- [Artificial Intelligence & Automation](https://codeaquarium.tech/services/artificial-intelligence): Custom AI copilots, chatbots, AI agents, document intelligence, and workflow automation wired into existing tools; secure, cost-aware LLM integration.
- [Digital Marketing](https://codeaquarium.tech/services/digital-marketing): Full-funnel growth — technical and content SEO, paid acquisition, lifecycle email, analytics, and conversion-rate optimization.
- [DevOps & Cloud](https://codeaquarium.tech/services/devops-cloud): CI/CD pipelines, cloud architecture (AWS/GCP/Azure), observability, and security for 99.9%+ uptime.
- [Data Engineering](https://codeaquarium.tech/services/data-engineering): Web scraping, ETL/ELT pipelines, data warehousing, and BI dashboards for reliable, decision-ready data.
- [UX/UI Design](https://codeaquarium.tech/services/ux-ui-design): Product and UX design, design systems, prototyping, and Figma-to-code for interfaces that lift conversion.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://codeaquarium.tech/): Overview of services, work, and outcomes.
- [Services](https://codeaquarium.tech/services): All six service areas.
- [Portfolio](https://codeaquarium.tech/portfolio): Case studies with measurable results.
- [About](https://codeaquarium.tech/about): Team philosophy and how we work.
- [Contact](https://codeaquarium.tech/contact): Start a project or ask a question.
- [Free Consultation](https://codeaquarium.tech/free-consultancy): Book a free 30-minute strategy session.

## Selected case studies
- RocketOps AI — AI operations platform: cut manual ops time by 65% with custom copilots and automation.
- Shifts Swaps — corporate SaaS for shift swapping: +52% dashboard speed, 99% accessibility, end-to-end encryption.
- MyGoToDoc — HIPAA-compliant telehealth platform: +63% completed consultations, <5 min to booking.
- HyperG Internet — internet-packages platform: median page load 2.4s → 0.8s, 99.98% uptime.
